name: Fidelity Money Market — FZFXX (Liquidity Runway)

provenance.source: Fidelity account statement — FZFXX position established March 2020
provenance.author: grayson.culliford@hivefs.com

thesis_summary: The Fidelity Government Money Market Fund (FZFXX) is our primary liquidity runway vehicle. It currently yields ~4.85% APY with same-day liquidity. This is Layer 1 of the barbell — it is not an investment, it is insurance. The balance should cover 6–12 months of all operating expenses and debt service at all times. It never goes to zero.
risk_factors: Yield falls when the Fed cuts rates — monitor for rate environment changes
Not FDIC insured (though SIPC-covered up to $500K); government MMF is considered very low risk
Opportunity cost if held in excess — excess above 12-month runway should be redeployed
